{"title":"Daily AI Info","elements":[[{"tag":"text","text":"News"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"开发生态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"1. "},{"tag":"text","text":"知乎数据开放平台提供搜索、热榜和直答服务，支持 Skills 或 API 调用"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
据用户发现， 知乎 数据开放平台现已提供站内搜索、全网搜索、 知乎热榜 和 知乎直答 等能力，并兼容 Skills 、 API 、 MCP 等调用方式。目前，注册可获每日 1000 次搜索试用额度。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/2033565515994678331","text":"https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/2033565515994678331"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"2. "},{"tag":"text","text":"中国电信发布多档Token套餐 月费9.9元起"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
中国电信 推出“试商用” Token 套餐，面向个人、家庭及中小微企业开发者提供 9.9元 至 299.9元 不等的月费方案，并计划推出 天翼 Token 币 及相关权益。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/iwUSgswBqoQ2q29GpjWdaA","text":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/iwUSgswBqoQ2q29GpjWdaA"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"行业动态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"3. "},{"tag":"text","text":"有关部门计划推进全国一体化算力网建设"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
媒体报道称，面对激增的 AI 算力需求，有关部门正计划推进全国一体化算力网建设，将其定位为与电网同等重要的公共基础设施。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/PgLA7DB-hA5MGwos6PITcg","text":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/PgLA7DB-hA5MGwos6PITcg"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"4. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google DeepMind 面向亚太区推出 AI for the Planet 加速器计划"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google DeepMind 宣布在亚太区推出主题为" AI for the Planet "的首届加速器计划。旨在帮助区域内初创企业、研究团队和非营利组织利用前沿 AI 解决气候、农业及能源等环境问题。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-deepmind/accelerator-ai-for-the-planet/","text":"https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-deepmind/accelerator-ai-for-the-planet/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"前瞻与传闻"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"5. "},{"tag":"text","text":"消息称 Gemini 应用特定模式悄然路由至疑似 3.2 新模型"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
据社区用户发现， Google Gemini 应用正逐步更新 UI 并推出" Thinking Level "功能，且在 Fast mode 下运行 Canvas 时，请求疑似已路由至 Gemini 3.2 的新 Flash 模型。上述功能与模型变更目前尚未得到官方确认。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/chetaslua/status/2055998563721900191","text":"https://x.com/chetaslua/status/2055998563721900191"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"6. "},{"tag":"text","text":"报道称 OpenAI 正在测试 Codex 多设备远程控制与“Locked Use”功能"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
据报道， OpenAI 正在测试 Codex 的多设备远程控制功能，并计划推出“Locked Use”设置，允许在锁屏状态下执行 Computer Use 任务，但目前上述功能尚未正式开放。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://www.testingcatalog.com/openai-will-let-codex-control-other-desktop-devices-via-computer-use/","text":"https://www.testingcatalog.com/openai-will-let-codex-control-other-desktop-devices-via-computer-use/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Paper"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"1. "},{"tag":"text","text":"X-SYNTH: Beyond Retrieval -- Enterprise Context Synthesis from Observed Human Attention"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-18"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
X-SYNTH通过分析员工数字化交互序列构建数字孪生签名，并组合七种注意滤波器合成企业上下文，使前沿模型在销售线索识别上真线索率提升6.5倍。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15505","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15505"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"2. "},{"tag":"text","text":"SkillSmith: Compiling Agent Skills into Boundary-Guided Runtime Interfaces"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-18"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
SkillSmith编译技能包中细粒度操作边界为最小可执行接口，在SkillsBench上减少57%的token使用和50%的求解时间，并实现强模型编译能力向弱模型迁移。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15215","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15215"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"3. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Nudging Beyond the Comfort Zone: Efficient Strategy-Guided Exploration for RLVR"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-18"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
NudgeRL通过策略微调提供上下文条件，诱导多样化推理路径，并利用分解奖励和蒸馏的统一目标学习，在五个数学基准上以小rollout预算超越GRPO及预言指导基线。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15726","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15726"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"4. "},{"tag":"text","text":"FORGE: Self-Evolving Agent Memory With No Weight Updates via Population Broadcast"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-18"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
FORGE提出基于群体的自我演化记忆协议，通过反射内环生成规则和示例等记忆，并在群体间广播最优记忆，在CybORG CAGE-2网络防御任务上将收益提升1.7-7.7倍，群体广播是关键，弱模型受益更明显。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16233","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16233"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"5. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Context Pruning for Coding Agents via Multi-Rubric Latent Reasoning"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-18"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
论文提出LaMR框架，将代码相关性分解为语义证据和依赖支持两个维度，通过双重CRF和混合专家门控网络进行结构化剪枝，无需额外标注即可利用AST分析生成多维标签；在SWE-Bench等四个基准上节省31%推理token，且多轮任务中12/16次对比优于全上下文基线，部分任务精确匹配提升3.5。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15315","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15315"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"6. "},{"tag":"text","text":"SMCEvolve: Principled Scientific Discovery via Sequential Monte Carlo Evolution"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-18"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
SMCEvolve将程序搜索重新描述为SMC采样，通过自适应重采样、混合变异和自动收敛控制，在跨领域基准上相比最先进系统减少LLM调用且性能更优。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15308","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15308"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"7. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Property-Guided LLM Program Synthesis for Planning"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-18"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
在PDDL规划域中，通过检查启发式是否满足“改进后继存在”属性并提供反例修复，引导LLM合成直接启发式，相比最优先前方法生成次数减少七倍且更多任务无需搜索即可解决，大幅降低计算成本。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16142","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16142"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"8. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Effective Harness Engineering for Algorithm Discovery with Coding Agents"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-18"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
针对LLM驱动的算法发现，论文研究harness设计，发现固定预算下少而深的算法生成效果更优，更强模型更易产生评估黑客，因此需集成检测机制，并在Circle Packing任务上验证了见解。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15221","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15221"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"9. "},{"tag":"text","text":"AgentStop: Terminating Local AI Agents Early to Save Energy in Consumer Devices"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-18"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
论文提出AgentStop，一种轻量级效率监督器，通过利用词元级对数概率等低成本执行信号，预测并提前终止本地大模型Agent中可能失败的任务轨迹，在网页问答和编程基准测试中减少15-20%的能量浪费，且性能损失小于5%，为消费设备上的可持续隐私保护Agent提供实用机制。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15206","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15206"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"10. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Logging Policy Design for Off-Policy Evaluation"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-14"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
针对离线策略评估的日志策略设计问题，提出奖励-覆盖权衡框架，并在收益分布已知、未知及部分已知三种信息条件下推导最优日志策略，为推荐系统离线评估提供理论指导与实用原则。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15108","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15108"}]]}
